Class Notification

java.lang.Object
Notifications.Notification
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable
public class Notification extends Object implements Serializable
Represents a system notification sent to a user.

Used for alerts (e.g., budget exceeded, goal completed) and reminders.

See Also:

  • Constructor Details

    • Notification

      public Notification(int userID, String type, String message)
      Constructs a new Notification.
      Parameters:
      userID - the user to whom the notification belongs
      type - the category/type of the notification
      message - the notification content

  • Method Details

    • markAsRead

      public void markAsRead()
      Marks this notification as read.

    • dismiss

      public void dismiss()
      Dismisses this notification (also marks as read).

    • updateIsRead

      public void updateIsRead(int notificationID, boolean isRead)
      Updates the read status if the ID matches.
      Parameters:
      notificationID - the ID to match
      isRead - the new read status

      public int getNotificationID()
      Returns:
      the notification ID

    • isRead

      public boolean isRead()
      Returns:
      true if the notification is read

    • getTimestamp

      public LocalDateTime getTimestamp()
      Returns:
      the time the notification was created

    • setNotificationID

      public void setNotificationID(int id)
      Parameters:
      id - the new notification ID

      Parameters:
      counter - the new static ID counter
